rbac_permissions.sensitivity: HIGH — Contains PHI. Only clinical role allowed.

rbac_permissions.reason: Even discharge cannot read clinical notes
Clinical has full EHR read access
Billing can only use billing tools
Pharmacy can use pharmacy tools + read med list

rbac_permissions.constraint: Billing must receive only item name and quantity for controlled substances
Pharmacy can resolve controlled substance brands to generics

rbac_permissions.reason: RBAC is enforced at tool level, not just prompt level
